networks.name: Awin
networks.notes: Awin merchant profile 90851 confirmed live. Offers 60-day cookie (vs 30-day on Impact.com). Up to $180/sale for NAS SKU. Monthly Incentives & Bonuses + Sponsorship for campaigns. Contact: erica.you@ugreen.com

commission.structure: Tiered — minimum 8% guaranteed; performance tiers up to 15%. NAS single SKU up to $180 commission.
commission.notes: Commission structure unchanged. NAS-specific high-ticket commission newly highlighted.

audit_history.cookie_notes: Awin program offers 60-day cookie — DOUBLE the 30-day on Impact.com. Significant competitive upgrade.
audit_history.creatives: Banners, seasonal campaigns, promo deal assets; NAS-focused featured collections added
audit_history.support: Dedicated affiliate team; Awin contact erica.you@ugreen.com

brand_signals.signal: New England Patriots partnership announced April 24, 2026
brand_signals.detail: Ugreen becomes Official Technology Accessory Partner for NEP 2026 season. First-ever global sports partnership. Will showcase SynCare AIoT Series + extra-tiny charging lineup at Gillette Stadium.
brand_signals.relevance: Major US brand awareness push. Signals increased marketing budget and likely expanded affiliate recruitment/incentives to match. Anker should monitor for affiliate term upgrades.
